Telemetry Required: Temperature, power draw, clocks, fan/cooling status, ambient/inlet if available
Warning Criteria: Idle temperature high but stable or ambient data missing
Fail Criteria: Telemetry unavailable or uncontrolled temperature rise

Telemetry Required: Temperature, power draw, utilization, clocks, throttle indicators
Expected Behavior: Temperature rises then trends toward stable behavior
Warning Criteria: High but stable temperature or reduced cooling margin
Fail Criteria: Repeated throttling, shutdown, or thermal error

Telemetry Required: Temperature, power draw, utilization, clocks, throttle indicators, logs
Expected Behavior: Sustained load remains within expected platform limits
Warning Criteria: High stable temperature or intermittent non-critical throttling
Fail Criteria: Uncontrolled rise, repeated throttling, reset, shutdown

Telemetry Required: Fan/cooling state, inlet temperature if available, alerts
Expected Behavior: Cooling telemetry is accessible and recordable
Warning Criteria: Optional telemetry missing but GPU telemetry available

Preconditions: Liquid/immersion validation is explicitly out of execution scope
Telemetry Required: Vendor limits, service procedure, safety notes
Expected Behavior: Cooling method and validation limits are documented
Warning Criteria: Limits incomplete but not required for current test
Fail Criteria: Claimed liquid/immersion validation without approved procedure
Notes: Conceptual only unless lab procedure exists
